{{CargoRelic
|name=Julian Calendar
|rank=SS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-13
|source=CIV Master Scrolls (10.2%), Fragment Crafting (5.5%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Wishing (0.2%)
|description=On Jan 13, 45 BC, this reliable calendar had been used for more than ten days.

Julian Calendar was put into use by Julius Caesar, the Roman dictator. In the Julian calendar, a year is divided into 12 months, alternating between long and short months. There is one leap year every 4 years, and 365 days in a year, with one extra day added to February in the leap year. This calendar has an error of one day every 128 years when compared with the tropical year. More than a thousand years later, Pope Gregory XIII introduced the improved Gregorian calendar which is based on the Julian calendar.
|fame=69
|art=58
|fth=55
|civ=102
|tech=63
|ss1=Lumber Camp Output +4%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +4%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Lumber Camp Output +6%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +6%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Lumber Camp Output +8%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +8%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Lumber Camp Output +12%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +12%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +24<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50 
|ss5=Lumber Camp Output +16%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +16%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +32<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss6=Lumber Camp Output +22%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +22%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +44<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Lumber Camp Output +22%<br>Lumber Camp Max Cap +22%<br>Per 5 Lumber Camp LVLs, Snail ATK +44<br>Lumber Camp LVL: 50/50<br>Lumber Camp Output +20% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill III.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: Earth DMG +600
|skill2=[[File:Genesim skill III.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: Snail DEF +120 each round
|skill3=[[File:Fungusfarm skill III.png|50px]]Place in Fungus Farm: Max Cap +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Earth DMG Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Skill]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Output Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Dragon Descents Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Crystal of Will]]
